name: io.alterlab/mcp-server
description: Web scraping MCP server — scrape, extract structured data, screenshot any site with anti-bot bypass.

environment_variables.name: ALTERLAB_API_KEY
environment_variables.description: Your AlterLab API key (starts with sk_live_). Get one at https://alterlab.io

tools.name: alterlab_scrape
tools.description: Scrape any website with anti-bot bypass and proxy rotation. Returns clean text, HTML, markdown, or JSON.

tools.name: alterlab_extract
tools.description: Extract structured data from any URL using AI. Define a schema and get back typed JSON.

tools.name: alterlab_screenshot
tools.description: Take a screenshot of any webpage with configurable viewport and format.

tools.name: alterlab_estimate_cost
tools.description: Estimate the credit cost of a scrape before running it.

tools.name: alterlab_check_balance
tools.description: Check your current account balance and credit usage.

tools.name: alterlab_get_usage
tools.description: Get a detailed spending breakdown — credits consumed today, this week, and this month, plus top domains by cost.

tools.name: alterlab_crawl
tools.description: Start a full website crawl for RAG indexing or knowledge base building. Returns a crawl_id for async polling.

tools.name: alterlab_crawl_status
tools.description: Poll the status and results of an ongoing or completed crawl.

tools.name: alterlab_crawl_cancel
tools.description: Cancel an ongoing crawl and refund unused credits.

tools.name: alterlab_search
tools.description: Search the web across Google/Bing/DuckDuckGo. Returns URLs, titles, and snippets.

tools.name: alterlab_map
tools.description: Discover all URLs on a website without scraping content. Returns a URL map for planning crawls.

tools.name: alterlab_batch
tools.description: Submit a batch of URLs to scrape asynchronously. Returns a batch_id for polling.

tools.name: alterlab_batch_status
tools.description: Poll the status and results of an asynchronous batch scrape job.

tools.name: alterlab_list_sessions
tools.description: List all active authenticated browser sessions.

tools.name: alterlab_create_session
tools.description: Create a new authenticated browser session with cookies for logged-in scraping.

tools.name: alterlab_get_session
tools.description: Get details of a specific authenticated session.

tools.name: alterlab_update_session
tools.description: Update cookies or settings on an existing session.

tools.name: alterlab_refresh_session
tools.description: Refresh an authenticated session to extend its lifetime.

tools.name: alterlab_validate_session
tools.description: Validate that a session's cookies are still active and working.

tools.name: alterlab_delete_session
tools.description: Delete an authenticated browser session.

tools.name: alterlab_list_beta_features
tools.description: List all available beta features with their opt-in status.

tools.name: alterlab_list_my_beta_features
tools.description: List beta features you have opted into.

tools.name: alterlab_enable_beta_feature
tools.description: Enable a beta feature by its slug.

tools.name: alterlab_disable_beta_feature
tools.description: Disable a beta feature by its slug.
